title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at CRISIL - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at CRISIL - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
CRISIL is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About CRISIL:
CRISIL is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CRISIL!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
